chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1779 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For hearing of CMA No.6788/2024 (S/A) 2. For hearing of main case 16.12.2024 Syed Tanveer Abbas Shah, Advocate for the petitioner Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General along with Shahid Ahmed Abro, Controller of Examinations, SPSC. >>>>>..<<<<< Through this Petition, the petitioner prays for recounting of the marks, which he has secured. Learned AAG files comments of respondents No.2 and 3, taken on record. When confronted with prayer clause, learned AAG assisted by the officer submits that the petitioner has not filed any Representation in terms of Regulation of RMR 161 before the department and further submits that as and when he may file such Representation, it shall be decided strictly on merits as well in accordance with the law within 15 (fifteen) days’ time. When confronted, learned counsel being satisfied, does not wish to press instant Constitutional Petition and undertakes to submit representation before respondents within 15 days from today, however, the same shall be decided within 15 days’ time. The petitioner is at liberty to file/submit his representation in terms of Section 161 RMR, before the respondents within 15 days’ time from today. Upon filing/receipt of such his representation, the respondents after due notice to other side and hearing to all concerned shall decide it within 15 days’ time under intimation to this Court through Additional Registrar. In view of the above, this petition has served its’ purpose, therefore, it is hereby disposed of along with pending applications, if any.

Upon filing/receipt of such his representation, the respondents after due notice to other side and hearing to all concerned shall decide it within 15 days’ time under intimation to this Court through Additional Registrar. In view of the above, this petition has served its’ purpose, therefore, it is hereby disposed of along with pending applications, if any. Judge Judge ARBROHI
